title: Sakura Single Cylinder Foot Pump PG270 – 52cm Hose, Thumb Lock Connector, Pressure Gauge, 3 Valve Adaptors
features: MULTI-PURPOSE for use on cars, motorbikes, bicycles, inflatables
INCLUDES 3 valve adaptors, a thumb lock connector and a 52cm air hose
SAFE TO USE with TuV approval
RUBBER FEET stop the foot pump from moving when in use
NON-SLIP pedal stops your foot from slipping
description: From the manufacturer Feeling Flat? Sakura's essential single and twin foot pumps will come to your rescue Twin Cylinder Footpump Quicker Inflation Heavy duty 57cm air hose Easy to use thumb lock/lever valve connector TUV approved Dial in Your Target Pressure 0 to 100 psi gauge Adjustable bezel indicator Needs a Bit of Legwork Non-slip rubber footplate Large cylinder capacity for quick inflation What's in the Box? The double foot pump 3 valve adaptors for non-tyre tasks such as paddling pools, footballs and air beds Single Cylinder Footpump Quick Inflation Ideal for motorbikes, bicycles, dinghys and other inflatables Steel framed for longevity Get Connected A heavy duty 57cm hose with thumb lock connector for ultimate efficiency Get a Grip Rubber feet and a heavily textured footplate help prvent 'slippage' during use What's in the Box?
